settings.providerHelp: Which AI service is used. Only the fields of the selected provider are shown.
settings.anthropicKeyHelp: Your Claude key (sk-ant-...). Stored server-side only.
settings.batchModelHelp: A cheaper model is recommended for bulk runs.
settings.qualityMaxScoreHelp: Texts above this threshold are regenerated automatically; in batch runs they are not written. 10 = strict, 30 = balanced (default), 60 = lenient.
settings.qualityMaxRetriesHelp: How often the backend regenerates on violations (with concrete feedback to the AI). Default: 2.
settings.qualityHint: Every generation runs server-side through: AI pattern scoring, meta length checks (title 50-60, description 140-155) and, in optimise mode, the fact preservation check. Only passing content is written in batch runs.
settings.qualityWhitelistHelp: Comma-separated words/phrases excluded from AI pattern scoring (server gate and admin display), e.g.: offers, versatile
settings.animalProfile: Add animal profile paragraph for animal products
settings.funFact: Add "Did you know" fun fact for animal products
settings.researchHelp: The AI researches the web before writing (manufacturer sites, specialist info) — like the research requirement of the SEO skills. Works with Claude and OpenAI; incurs extra cost per text.

generator.title: Generate texts
generator.channelFilterHelp: Shows only the categories of the selected sales channel. Without a selection, all categories are searched.
generator.modeHelp: Create new: the text is generated from scratch. Optimise existing: the current text is the base — facts are preserved, wording is humanised and SEO-optimised.
generator.gatePassed: Quality gate passed ({attempts} attempt) | Quality gate passed ({attempts} attempts)
generator.gateFailed: Quality gate NOT passed — please review
generator.noExistingText: No existing text available — please use "Create new" mode.
generator.noMetaFields: Please select at least one meta field.
generator.hint: When applied, the teaser is written into the text slot of the category layout (first text slot before the product listing).
generator.channelFirst: Please select a sales channel first — the category tree of that shop will then appear.

batch.title: Batch processing
batch.needSelection: Please select entities and at least one text type.
batch.workerHint: A running message worker processes the jobs in the background. Without a worker, jobs stay on "running" forever.
batch.workerStalled: No progress for 30 seconds — is a message worker running (admin worker active or bin/console messenger:consume)? Without a worker the job hangs.
batch.languageHelp: Applies to selection, generation and all scans. Bilingual shops: run once per language.
batch.modeHelp: Optimise existing: current texts are reworked (facts preserved); entities WITHOUT an existing text are created from scratch automatically (gap filling).
batch.dryRunHelp: Content is generated and checked, but NOTHING is written to the shop. After completion, all gate-passing results can be applied in one go.
batch.dryRunDone: Dry run finished: {passed} result(s) passed the quality gate and can be applied. Nothing was written.
batch.rejectedHint: Rejected entities did not pass the quality gate and were NOT written to the shop (details in the log). Threshold and revisions are configurable in the settings.

focus.label: Focus keyword
focus.help: Stored on the entity (custom field) and steers generation: mandatory placement in meta title, H1 and first paragraph, 2-3x naturally in the body.
focus.cannibalWarning: Cannibalisation warning — this focus keyword is already used by {count} other entitie(s):

readability.title: Readability checks
readability.sentenceLength: Sentence lengths (share of sentences over 25 words)

tools.title: SEO tools
tools.hint: Standalone maintenance and diagnostics tools — independent of batch processing. The selected language applies to all tools on this page; bilingual shops should run each language once.
tools.renameClean: No images with non-descriptive file names found — all clean.
tools.linebreaksClean: No line breaks found ({scanned} categories checked) — all clean.
tools.cannibalClean: No cannibalisation found — no duplicate focus keywords or identical meta titles.

rename.title: SEO file names (product images)
rename.hint: Finds product images with article-number/hash file names (e.g. 15601a.jpg) and suggests descriptive names from product name + alt text (no AI, deterministic). TIP: Generate alt texts first (gap scan → vision batch) — without descriptive alts only number suffixes (-2, -3) remain. Every rename is logged — the export generates the nginx 301 redirects for Plesk.
rename.found: {total} image(s) in total — this run processes {batch} (wave principle: rescan after renaming for the next batch)
rename.warning: Renaming changes the image URLs. Afterwards download the redirect file and include it in Plesk (Apache & nginx settings → Additional nginx directives) so old URLs redirect via 301.
rename.altFirst: Recommendation: {count} of the found images have NO alt text yet — generate alt texts first (batch → media → gap scan), then rename. Otherwise only number suffixes remain.
rename.confirmText: {count} image(s) will be renamed irreversibly — the image URLs in the shop change immediately.
rename.done: {renamed} image(s) renamed ({errors} errors) — update the redirect file!

freshness.clean: All texts up to date — no data changes since generation, nothing older than 6 months.
freshness.use: Use all as selection (switches to "optimise existing" mode)

cannibal.title: Keyword cannibalisation
cannibal.hint: Finds entities competing for the same Google ranking with the same focus keyword or identical meta titles.

gaps.title: Gap scan & quality report
gaps.hint: Finds entities WITHOUT content (gap filling) or the worst existing texts (work queue for optimising) — based on entity type and language above.
gaps.use: Use as selection (switches to "create new" mode)
gaps.useWorst: Use worst 25 as selection (switches to "optimise existing" mode)
gaps.clean: No gaps found — all content is complete.
gaps.reportClean: No AI patterns found ({scanned} texts checked) — all existing texts clean.
gaps.reportResult: {total} texts with AI patterns of {scanned} checked (top 50 shown)
gaps.weakAlt: Product images with generic alt text ("product image 2", too short, file name)

variants.angleHelp: For categories in multiple sales channels: same facts, different wording and focus — to avoid duplicate content.
variants.referenceHelp: Optional: existing variant from another sales channel — the new text is deliberately phrased clearly differently.

linebreaks.title: Line break cleanup (CMS slots)
linebreaks.hint: Line breaks in category text slots cause display problems in the storefront. The scan checks all categories of the selected language.
